office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, jail and civil functions, emergency response, staffing, training, and interagency public-safety work.
race_blurb: Both candidates have command experience; incumbent Rick Felici emphasizes continuity and standards, while Langley police chief Tavier Wasser emphasizes communication, training, and recruitment.

candidates.summary: Felici is the incumbent sheriff with policing, corrections, military, and command experience, emphasizing response, standards, retention, trust, and safety.
highlights: Serves as incumbent sheriff after chief-criminal-deputy experience [S1]
Emphasizes emergency response, standards, and retention [S1]

safety.basis: Emergency response and policing standards support an enforcement lean, though no maximal mechanism is specified.

experience.basis: Incumbency plus broad policing, corrections, military, and command experience establish a proven record.

candidates.summary: Wasser is a police chief and Marine veteran emphasizing communication, training, accountability, recruitment, and community safety.
highlights: Emphasizes training, accountability, recruitment, and safety [S1]

safety.basis: His command platform centers police capacity and accountability, supporting a modest enforcement lean.

experience.basis: Police-chief service and military experience provide a substantial institutional record, though not county-sheriff incumbency.
